text.message: U should have go ne 6511 now green will have the 6 wheat …

ofc if u leave that open red
why didnt you take it then
but the reason it's open isnt blacks settlement
thatll stop green from taking it
why should i suicide instead of you lol
If I took it he would have take the other 6 wheat spot …
and that forced black to pick a creative setup
yeah you want me to suicide my game but not your yoruself
if i take 6 4 11 then i also take 8 10 from you
extorting vs black is just mean
just own your pick/ban greediness mistake
who might also attack your wheat port attempt

feels like youre the one 5 y old not knowing how to count
like find a way to make up
otherwise it's just blue profiting with free longest road, specialized port
i dont think thats the right way
yeah i can understand it. but u still have a chance
also soloing the rsource he needs
and winning those games from behind always feels the best
yeah well feels better putting an idiot to bed
Definitely 4 years old green don’t try to resonate
red maybe if u move it there u can come to an understanding
me being 4 years old can count better than you
damn what were the odds to miss an ore there lol
red on 9 potentially next turn here
what are you missing for the settle blue

ur not man. u can still connect here
u got the tough city objective down

now ur at 7 with road claim
maybe i can give u sheep for 4:1?
